title: 10 fixes — Follow race-guard, blocks/mutes cross-screen sync, timer leaks (incl. 3 verifier-fixes)
notes: FIX: Rapid Follow/Unfollow tapping no longer leaves the button in the wrong state — in-flight write is now guarded so the 2nd tap is dropped instead of racing the 1st.
FIX: Follow/unfollow on no internet now shows error toast instead of stuck button (was previously silent + state stuck on optimistic value).
FIX: Blocking a user from chat / Moments / Profile-blocked-list now immediately updates the feed, message send-guard, and Moments strip — was previously stale until app reload.
FIX: Muting a post from Profile or another user's profile now syncs back to your Feed instantly — was previously stale until refresh.
FIX: Inbox timestamps no longer show 'NaNm ago' or '-1m ago' when server clock is ahead of phone clock (fresh PWA installs before NTP sync).
FIX: Moments toast (Status muted / Blocked / etc) no longer leaks setTimeout on viewer-close — small memory hygiene improvement during long sessions.
FIX: Account 'Save All' / 'Save Profile Info' setTimeout reset is now ref-tracked and cleared on unmount — no more stale setState if you navigate away mid-save.
FIX: Declined incoming call now clears its prefetched Agora token from window scope so a subsequent outgoing call starts cleanly.
